title.en: China-to-Burkina Faso BESS Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入布基纳法索：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入布吉納法索：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Burkina Faso ABNORM conformity requirements, ARSE regulatory licensing, SONABEL grid-connection requirements, IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 international standards referenced in donor-funded and IPP project specifications, UN 38.3 transport requirements for landlocked routing via West African port corridors, and high-temperature/dust derating considerations (ambient ≥45 °C) — versus China GB/T 36558-2023, GB/T 34120-2023, and NB/T 42090-2016 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与布基纳法索ABNORM合格评定要求、ARSE监管许可、SONABEL并网要求、捐助方和IPP项目规格中引用的IEC 62619和IEC 62933国际标准、经西非港口走廊内陆路线的UN 38.3运输要求及高温/粉尘降额考量（环境温度≥45 °C）——对比中国GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 34120-2023及NB/T 42090-2016基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與布吉納法索ABNORM合格評定要求、ARSE監管許可、SONABEL併網要求、捐助方和IPP項目規格中引用的IEC 62619和IEC 62933國際標準、經西非港口走廊內陸路線的UN 38.3運輸要求及高溫/粉塵降額考量（環境溫度≥45 °C）——對比中國GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 34120-2023及NB/T 42090-2016基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, ABNORM conformity scope determination, ARSE licensing approval, SONABEL grid-connection approval, ABER rural-electrification concession determination, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Burkina Faso ABNORM Technical Regulations, ARSE licensing requirements, SONABEL grid-connection technical specifications, ABER off-grid concession requirements, UN transport regulations, and donor/lender project specifications with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、ABNORM合格评定范围裁定、ARSE许可审批、SONABEL并网批准、ABER农村电气化特许裁定、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行布基纳法索ABNORM技术法规、ARSE许可要求、SONABEL并网技术规格、ABER离网特许要求、UN运输法规及捐助方/贷款方项目规格。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、ABNORM合格評定範圍裁定、ARSE許可審批、SONABEL併網批准、ABER農村電氣化特許裁定、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行布吉納法索ABNORM技術法規、ARSE許可要求、SONABEL併網技術規格、ABER離網特許要求、UN運輸法規及捐助方/貸款方項目規格。

answer_first.en: Burkina Faso does not yet have a published standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation under ABNORM equivalent to a mandatory IEC 62619 certification regime; product conformity assessment is governed by ABNORM (the national standards body, adopting IEC standards), while energy project licensing is overseen by ARSE (the energy regulatory authority) and grid connection by SONABEL (the national utility). The practical compliance gates for Chinese BESS exported to Burkina Faso are: (1) ABNORM conformity — ABNORM adopts IEC standards and project or authority review for grid-scale and donor-funded BESS will reference IEC 62619 cell/module safety and IEC 62933 system-level requirements; (2) ARSE licensing — all electricity generation and storage projects above defined capacity thresholds require an ARSE production licence or authorisation; (3) SONABEL grid-connection approval — grid-connected BESS must meet SONABEL's technical connection requirements (220/380 V, 50 Hz, same nominal as China but protection settings and local grid stability parameters differ); (4) Donor/lender specifications — World Bank, AFD, and AfDB-financed projects impose their own procurement and technical standards (typically IEC-based) that override or supplement national requirements; (5) High-temperature and dust derating — Burkina Faso's Sahel climate (ambient ≥45 °C, high dust loads) requires IEC 62619-compliant cell thermal testing and system thermal management design validated for local conditions; (6) Landlocked transport routing — Burkina Faso is landlocked; lithium battery shipments route via Abidjan (Côte d'Ivoire), Tema (Ghana), Lomé (Togo), or Cotonou (Benin) port corridors, each subject to IMDG/ADR dangerous-goods requirements and UN 38.3 test summary obligations; (7) Off-grid/mini-grid projects — ABER (Agence Burkinabè de l'Électrification Rurale) and FDE (Fonds de Développement de l'Électrification) govern rural electrification concessions, referencing IEC TS 62257 for mini-grid systems. Chinese GB/T 36558-2023 and GB/T 34120-2023 represent the manufacturing baseline but are not accepted as substitutes for IEC evidence in ARSE, SONABEL, donor, or ABNORM conformity review.
answer_first.zh: 布基纳法索目前尚无ABNORM框架下已发布的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规，与强制性IEC 62619认证制度相当；产品合格评定由ABNORM（国家标准机构，采纳IEC标准）管控，能源项目许可由ARSE（能源监管机构）监管，并网由SONABEL（国家电力公司）负责。中国BESS出口布基纳法索的实际合规门槛包括：（1）ABNORM合格评定——ABNORM采纳IEC标准，电网规模和捐助方资助BESS项目的机构审查将引用IEC 62619电芯/模组安全和IEC 62933系统级要求；（2）ARSE许可——超过规定容量阈值的所有发电和储能项目须取得ARSE生产许可证或授权；（3）SONABEL并网批准——并网BESS须满足SONABEL的技术并网要求（220/380 V、50 Hz，与中国标称值相同，但保护设定值和本地电网稳定性参数有所不同）；（4）捐助方/贷款方规格——世界银行、法开署（AFD）和非开行（AfDB）融资项目有其自身采购和技术标准（通常基于IEC），可凌驾于或补充国家要求；（5）高温和粉尘降额——布基纳法索萨赫勒气候（环境温度≥45 °C、高粉尘负荷）要求IEC 62619合规电芯热测试及针对当地条件验证的系统热管理设计；（6）内陆运输路线——布基纳法索为内陆国，锂电池货物经阿比让（科特迪瓦）、特马（加纳）、洛美（多哥）或科托努（贝宁）港口走廊转运，各走廊均受IMDG/ADR危险货物要求及UN 38.3测试摘要义务约束；（7）离网/微电网项目——ABER（布基纳法索农村电气化机构）和FDE（电气化发展基金）管理农村电气化特许，引用IEC TS 62257用于微电网系统。中国GB/T 36558-2023和GB/T 34120-2023是生产基准，但在ARSE、SONABEL、捐助方或ABNORM合格评定审查中不被接受为IEC证据的替代依据。
answer_first.zht: 布吉納法索目前尚無ABNORM框架下已發布的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規，與強制性IEC 62619認證制度相當；產品合格評定由ABNORM（國家標準機構，採納IEC標準）管控，能源項目許可由ARSE（能源監管機構）監管，併網由SONABEL（國家電力公司）負責。中國BESS出口布吉納法索的實際合規門檻包括：（1）ABNORM合格評定——ABNORM採納IEC標準，電網規模和捐助方資助BESS項目的機構審查將引用IEC 62619電芯/模組安全和IEC 62933系統級要求；（2）ARSE許可——超過規定容量閾值的所有發電和儲能項目須取得ARSE生產許可證或授權；（3）SONABEL併網批准——併網BESS須滿足SONABEL的技術併網要求（220/380 V、50 Hz，與中國標稱值相同，但保護設定值和本地電網穩定性參數有所不同）；（4）捐助方/貸款方規格——世界銀行、法開署（AFD）和非開行（AfDB）融資項目有其自身採購和技術標準（通常基於IEC），可凌駕於或補充國家要求；（5）高溫和粉塵降額——布吉納法索薩赫勒氣候（環境溫度≥45 °C、高粉塵負荷）要求IEC 62619合規電芯熱測試及針對當地條件驗證的系統熱管理設計；（6）內陸運輸路線——布吉納法索為內陸國，鋰電池貨物經阿比讓（科特迪瓦）、特馬（加納）、洛美（多哥）或科托努（貝寧）港口走廊轉運，各走廊均受IMDG/ADR危險貨物要求及UN 38.3測試摘要義務約束；（7）離網/微電網項目——ABER（布吉納法索農村電氣化機構）和FDE（電氣化發展基金）管理農村電氣化特許，引用IEC TS 62257用於微電網系統。中國GB/T 36558-2023和GB/T 34120-2023是製造基準，但在ARSE、SONABEL、捐助方或ABNORM合格評定審查中不被接受為IEC證據的替代依據。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
